info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API for managing and processing ecommerce build-time operations including product listings, inventory management, order processing, and customer interactions.

post.description: Create a new user account by providing necessary user details.

get.description: Fetch details of a specific user using their unique user ID.

post.description: Add a specified item to the user's shopping cart.

get.description: Retrieve all items currently present in a user's shopping cart.

delete.description: Delete a specified item from the user's shopping cart.

put.description: Modify the quantity or details of the items in the user's shopping cart.

get.description: Access detailed information about a specific payment transaction using its ID.

post.description: Receive and process webhook notifications related to payment events.
Begin the process of making a payment by submitting payment details.

get.description: Fetch a list of all available products in the catalog.

post.description: Add a new product to the inventory with the provided product details.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information of a specific product using its product ID.
Find products based on various search criteria such as category, price, and sorting options.

post.description: Submit a new order for a specified user using their user ID.

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific order using its order ID.

delete.description: Cancel an existing order using its order ID.

get.description: Fetch a list of all orders placed by a specific user.

post.description: Add a new shipping address to the user's profile.

parameters.name: addressId
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the address to be updated.

put.description: Updates the shipping address information for a given address ID. The updated address data must be provided in the request body.

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the order to be tracked.

get.description: Retrieves tracking information for a specific order using the given order ID, providing real-time status and location updates.
